sentences.arabic: تَحْتَفِلُ الْعَائِلَاتُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِشَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ بِالصَّوْمِ وَالصَّلَاةِ وَتَبَادُلِ الزِّيَارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske porodice obilježavaju mjesec ramazan postom, namazom i međusobnim posjetama.
sentences.translationEn: Arab families celebrate the month of Ramadan with fasting, prayer, and exchanging visits.
